## pf find pixel-hash

Print the CRC32 pixel hash of a screen region

```
pf find pixel-hash [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for pixel-hash
      --rect string   x0,y0,x1,y1 (default "0,0,100,100")
```
